---
title: "<Course Title>"
subtitle: "<Term>"
listing:
  contents: lectures/*/slides.qmd
  type: table
  fields: [week, date, title]
  field-display-names:
    week: "Week"
    date: "Date"
    title: "Lecture"
  sort: "date asc"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
---

## About this course

<One-paragraph description of the course.>

## Quick links

- [Syllabus](syllabus.qmd)
- [Gradebook](gradebook.qmd)

## Lectures
